name: gws-toolkit
description: ⚠️ WORK IN PROGRESS — successor to slides-toolkit. Generic Google Workspace toolkit layered on the official googleworkspace/cli (gws). Vendors upstream gws-shared / gws-drive / gws-docs / gws-slides / gws-sheets API reference skills, plus toolkit-original setup automation, design knowledge (Minto / SCQA / chart-selection for Slides), and safety wrappers (trash-default delete, appProperties provenance tagging). Not affiliated with Google. ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks Google API calls.
